name: Streamer Mini Games Collection
short_description: This game allows the streamer's chat members to participate and interact with the game using chat commands. Mini games can be used as community games, during the streamer's breaks or used to participate in the streamer's raffles.
detailed_description:
This game allows the streamer's chat members to participate and interact with the game using chat commands. Mini games can be used as community games, during the streamer's breaks or used to participate in the streamer's raffles.

Game is integrated with Twitch.tv API and enables Twitch Streamers to involve their viewers in the game. Streamer just need to link own Twitch channel to the game and then game is ready to play.

The collection includes the following games, e.g.

- Plastic duck fight (Fight against other players or collect beach balls)

- Chicken fight (Fight against other players or collect eggs)

- Dart throw

- Dice game

New mini games are planned to be added to the game at some point.
